title: Downloads
emptyDownloads: No downloads yet. Search for music and tap download.
importPlaylistHint: Paste a YouTube or Spotify playlist URL
cancelAllMessage: Active and queued downloads will be cancelled. Completed downloads will stay in the list.
backgroundPermissionNotice: Enable notifications to keep downloads running in the background.
notificationPermissionNotice: Enable notifications to show download progress, completion, and failures.
notificationFallbackBody: Open TON to review this download.
playlistImportedWithSkipped: Added {{queued}} tracks to download queue; {{skipped}} were already saved or queued
playlistAlreadySaved: All {{count}} playlist tracks are already saved
playlistAlreadyQueued: All {{count}} playlist tracks are already in the download queue
playlistAlreadyHandled: All {{count}} playlist tracks are already saved or queued
playlistEmpty: This playlist has no downloadable tracks

failureReasons.accessRequired: This YouTube video requires access that TON does not have.
failureReasons.ageRestricted: This YouTube video is age restricted and cannot be downloaded.
failureReasons.authorizationRequired: The source requires access that TON does not have.
failureReasons.conversion: Audio conversion failed before the file could be saved.
failureReasons.copyrightRestricted: This YouTube video is unavailable because of a copyright restriction.
failureReasons.fileSave: The downloaded audio file could not be saved.
failureReasons.invalidAudio: The source returned an invalid or blocked audio file.
failureReasons.network: The download failed because of a network connection problem.
failureReasons.noCompatibleAudio: No compatible M4A audio stream is available for this item.
failureReasons.noDownloadUrl: The source did not provide a downloadable audio URL.
failureReasons.noMatch: No suitable YouTube match was found for this song.
failureReasons.privateVideo: This YouTube video is private and cannot be downloaded.
failureReasons.rateLimited: The source is temporarily rate limiting downloads. Try again later.
failureReasons.regionRestricted: This YouTube video is not available in your region.
failureReasons.rejectedLink: The source rejected the download link. Use Retry to request a new link.
failureReasons.sourceUnavailable: The source is temporarily unavailable. Try again later.
failureReasons.unavailableVideo: This YouTube video is unavailable or has been removed.
failureReasons.unknown: The download failed unexpectedly. Use Retry to try again.
failureReasons.urlUnavailable: The download URL is no longer available.
failureReasons.verificationRequired: YouTube requires verification before this video can be downloaded.
